item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks. Added a few touch ups that should correct your nitpicks unless I missed anything.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: As mentioned, there are some tone and formatting issues. But overall, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Few errors here and there, especially towards the end. You state that SCP-4425 is the phenomenon, but then the designation refers to the can later on? "an ad" should probably be "an advertisement", and you say the website was known as something, when that's actually just the URL. Referring to it as "down" is probably not clinical tone, and this whole sentence:

The front page of the website was a video explaining how PoI-429 creates SCP-4425, elaborating in video various details on the subject's head acting as an "oven to prepare" SCP-4425 and the meant process of consumption is "straight from the head".

Could do with rewriting. I had to read it five or six times to work out what it was saying.

Those are mostly nitpicks, though. There's a solid concept here; it just needs a tune-up to turn it from good to great.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My 5th item. Got tired of waiting for people to look at it, went ahead and posted it. If it flops I'll just rewrite it.

Link to my author page
Image attribution

Thanks to the people on the SCPDeclassified discord for taking a look at this.
